positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial cityscape viewed from a floating gondola. The composition is centered and vertically balanced, featuring clean, interlocking geometric structures representing buildings and clouds. The primary color palette is deep indigo, muted gold, and soft cream. Focus on strong silhouettes and elegant linework, resembling Art Deco geometry blended with cosmic wonder. The sky has subtle nebula gradients and stylized star trails. Perfect for a repeatable, high-contrast apparel print. High detail, clean vector aesthetic, graphic novel style.
